Implements the TypeError prototype for ECMAScript built-in error handling in JerryScript.

# Purpose
This C source code file is part of the ECMAScript engine implementation, specifically dealing with the TypeError prototype object. It includes various header files that provide necessary functions and macros for memory allocation, built-in object handling, type conversion, exception handling, garbage collection, and other ECMAScript-related operations. The file conditionally compiles the TypeError prototype built-in routines if the `CONFIG_DISABLE_ERROR_BUILTINS` macro is not defined, indicating that error built-ins are enabled. The inclusion of `ecma-builtin-internal-routines-template.inc.h` with specific macros set up (`BUILTIN_INC_HEADER_NAME` and `BUILTIN_UNDERSCORED_ID`) suggests that this file uses a template-based approach to define internal routines for the TypeError prototype.
